items.title: Zacks Industry Outlook Highlights Travelers, Allstate, Cincinnati Financial, CNA Financial and Axis Capital
items.description: Travelers, Allstate, Cincinnati Financial, CNA Financial and Axis Capital stand out as Zacks sees strong growth ahead for the P&C insurance industry.

items.title: Chamath Palihapitiya Warns Of 'Massive Value Destruction' For Insurers In Autonomous Era — Only 'Rich Enthusiasts' Will Continue To Drive
items.description: Billionaire investor Chamath Palihapitiya is predicting a significant shift in the auto insurance industry, driven by the growing penetration of Alphabet Inc.'s (NASDAQ: GOOG) Waymo and Tesla Inc.'s (NASDAQ: TSLA) Cybercab in the U.S. domestic mobility market.
